args.code: (async () => { const findScroller = () => { let best=null; document.querySelectorAll('*').forEach(el => { const cs=getComputedStyle(el); const oy=cs.overflowY; if((oy==='auto'||oy==='scroll') && el.scrollHeight>el.clientHeight+20){ if(!best||el.clientHeight>best.clientHeight) best=el; } }); return best; }; const sc=findScroller(); if(!sc) return JSON.stringify({error:'no scroller'}); const countPosts=()=>document.querySelectorAll('div.fie-impression-container').length || document.querySelectorAll('[data-view-name="feed-full-update"]').length || [...document.querySelectorAll('button')].filter(b=>/^(Follow|Connect)$/.test((b.innerText||'').trim())).length; const steps=[]; for(let i=0;i<6;i++){ const beforeSH=sc.scrollHeight; const beforePosts=countPosts(); sc.scrollBy(0, sc.clientHeight*0.9); sc.dispatchEvent(new WheelEvent('wheel',{deltaY:600,bubbles:true})); await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,2500)); steps.push({ i, top:sc.scrollTop, beforeSH, afterSH:sc.scrollHeight, beforePosts, afterPosts:countPosts() }); } return JSON.stringify({tag:sc.tagName, clientH:sc.clientHeight, steps}); })()
